authors: De La Porte C, Van de Kelft E
title: Spinal cord stimulation in failed back surgery syndrome
study_question: Can selected FBSS patients achieve long-term pain control with spinal cord stimulation?
population_assessed: 78 FBSS patients with radicular pain, no surgically treatable lesion
outcome_measures: Pain relief, medication use, daily activities, device use, satisfaction
inclusion_criteria: FBSS, no surgical lesion, radicular pain, psychiatric stability, 75-100% trial relief
answer_to_study_question: 54% of implanted patients had successful long-term outcomes; medication and lifestyle also improved.
